palm-tall.name: Island Tree 01
palm-tall.note: Best CC0 tropical tree from Poly Haven. Generic broad-leaf island tree (not a true palm). For true palm trees use Quaternius Ultimate Stylized Nature pack or Kenney Pirate Kit. Alternative: Poly Pizza palm at https://poly.pizza/m/A6cKJYFsIb

palm-short.name: Island Tree 02
palm-short.note: Shorter tropical island tree. Alternative: Quaternius cartoon palm or Poly Pizza palm at https://poly.pizza/m/e0AbYA90ux5

rock-round.name: Sand Rocks Small 01
rock-round.note: Small weathered rocks on sand - perfect beach rock match. Also alternative: namaqualand_stones_01, stone_01, rock_07, rock_09 for variety

rock-large.name: Boulder 01
rock-large.note: Large rounded boulder with lichen. Also alternative: coast_rocks_01/02/03 for shoreline boulders

seashell.name: Lambis Shell
seashell.note: Excellent seashell model - conch/lambis type with beach/shore tags. Perfect match.

starfish.name: Starfish (search result)
starfish.note: Poly Pizza search result for starfish. License is CC0 (Poly Pizza default). Alternative: Sketchfab CC0 search or procedural 5-point star mesh. Also check Quaternius props packs.

driftwood.name: Dead Tree Trunk
driftwood.note: Weathered dead tree trunk with bark, excellent for driftwood. Alternate: bark_debris_01 (drier/dead wood), dead_tree_trunk_02 (larger), dead_quiver_branch_02 (driftwood-like branch)

cloud-puffy.name: Cloud (search result)
cloud-puffy.note: Poly Pizza search result for cloud. CC0 licensed. Best alternative: UE5 built-in Volumetric Clouds system or sky card meshes (procedural, no download needed). Also check Kenney sky pack.

beach-grass.name: Grass Bermuda 01
beach-grass.note: Dune/coastal grass clump from Smugglers Cove collection. Perfect beach dune grass. Alternative: grass_medium_01, grass_medium_02, flower_heliophila for variety

tiki-hut.name: Tiki Hut (search result)
tiki-hut.note: Poly Pizza search result for tiki hut. CC0 licensed. Alternative: Quaternius Pirate Kit (has thatched structures), Kenney Pirate Kit (has tiki-style buildings), or build procedurally from cylinders + cone roof
